headline: Assessing Wynn Resorts (WYNN) Valuation After Construction Resumes At US$5.1b Al Marjan Island Resort
summary: Wynn Resorts (WYNN) has resumed construction of its US$5.1b Wynn Al Marjan Island resort in the UAE after a brief pause tied to Middle East tensions, with work continuing under tighter safety protocols. See our latest analysis for Wynn Resorts. The recent pullback in Wynn Resorts' share price, with a 30 day share price return of 15.46% and a 90 day share price return of 20.11%, sits alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 19.78%. This suggests short term momentum has cooled while...
